action: Replace the process-local peer terminal index with a durable compare-and-set journal contract.

progress.finding: Cross-run terminal uniqueness requires an atomic strong-validator precondition over durable state; process-local maps cannot supply that guarantee.
progress.verification: 6 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-identical candidate source before commit

handoff: Wire the journal into peer-execution-runtime through appendEvent, implement one production backend with atomic compareAndSet semantics, and run a two-process collision test against the real backend.
